visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a beige Roots-branded hoodie, a grey newsboy cap, and round-rimmed glasses stands against a backdrop of light-colored curtains. He holds a small, rose gold iPhone SE (1st gen) close to the lens. His expression is friendly and smiling, and he gestures toward the phone's small size. (2) The scene shifts to the man holding a vibrant red iPhone SE (2nd gen). He points his index finger at the screen while maintaining eye contact with the camera, appearing enthusiastic. The lighting is bright and even across his face. (3) The man now holds a white iPhone SE (3rd gen). He uses both hands to emphasize the device, gesturing dynamically while speaking. He raises a finger to indicate a specific point about the phone's performance. (4) He sits back slightly, holding a white iPhone horizontally to display a video clip on its screen. The video within the frame shows a scene inside a shop. Graphic bursts and star-shaped overlays appear around the phone to highlight it. (5) A top-down shot shows four iPhones laid out on a light wood grain table: Rose Gold, Red, and two White models. A hand points to each one sequentially from left to right. Finally, the man reappears, pointing directly at the viewer with a cartoon dog sticker placed over his chest.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 2016年iPhone初代的SE登場的時候. [Subtitle]: 小巧機身. [Subtitle]: 性能好. [Subtitle]: 立刻成為經典. [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. (2) [Subtitle]: 2020年第二代iPhone SE新登場. [Subtitle]: A13處理器. [Subtitle]: 保留經典設計效能更順暢. (3) [Subtitle]: 2022年iPhone SE 第三代. [Subtitle]: A15處理器. [Subtitle]: 你看外觀不變但續航升級. [Subtitle]: 所以它速度也變更快. [Subtitle]: 我還在用. (4) [Subtitle]: iPhone 16E 2025年全新登場. [Subtitle]: SE的繼任最新一代. [Subtitle]: 蘋果的平價AI的神機. (5) [Subtitle]: 第一代. [Subtitle]: 第二代. [Subtitle]: 第三代. [Subtitle]: iPhone 16E. [Variety]: 你喜歡哪一個?

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main male creator performing a tech review.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male wearing a beige 'Roots' hoodie, a grey flat cap, and circular glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with light-colored curtains and a wooden table surface used for product shots.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic pop BGM kicks in with a steady, driving drum beat. A male voice speaks with high enthusiasm and rapid pacing, describing the 2016 iPhone SE. A subtle camera shutter SFX punctuates the transition. (2) The voice maintains high arousal, emphasizing tech specs. A bright 'ding' SFX sounds as he highlights the A13 processor, synchronized with his pointing gesture. The BGM remains consistent in volume and tempo. (3) A digital 'whoosh' SFX signals a scene cut. The speaker continues at a fast speech rate, sounding confident and professional. The vocal timbre is clear and well-recorded, with a slight rise in pitch for emphasis. (4) As he introduces the '16E', a sparkle-like synthesized sound effect overlays the narration. The BGM maintains its upbeat energy, and the speaker's tone becomes more anticipatory and excited. (5) The narrator counts '1st, 2nd, 3rd' in a rhythmic fashion, ending with a cheerful final question. A cartoon-style 'pop' sound effect marks the appearance of the end-screen graphics. The track ends with a clean fade-out of both the vocal and music.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Chronological Review -> Future Speculation -> Audience Engagement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review the history and evolution of the iPhone SE series while speculating on the upcoming iPhone 16E to generate audience interest and engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: General tech news and review content; no specific sponsor cited.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Typical high-energy tech influencer content tailored for short-form platforms using fast cuts and bright overlays.
